name: nutri-land
description: Landing page Dr. Antônio Wellington — Medicina do Emagrecimento

scripts.dev: npm run build:css && npm run serve
scripts.build: npm run build:css && rm -rf public && mkdir -p public/dist public/src && cp index.html public/ && cp dist/output.css public/dist/ && cp -R src/assets public/src/assets
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy public --project-name=nutri-land --commit-dirty=true
